tasks.name: Add code-review-graph dependency
tasks.notes: Added code-review-graph>=2.3,<3.0 to requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, and Dockerfile. Package verified on PyPI (latest 2.3.2).

tasks.name: Add enable_graph config setting
tasks.notes: Added enable_graph: bool = Field(default=True) to Settings class after log_format. Added ENABLE_GRAPH=${ENABLE_GRAPH:-1} to docker-compose.yml environment block.

tasks.name: Create src/graph_builder.py
tasks.notes: Created src/graph_builder.py with build_graph(workspace) -> Optional[Any]. Uses code_review_graph.tools.build.build_or_update_graph (full_rebuild=True, postprocess=minimal) then opens GraphStore via get_db_path. Has 30s timeout via ThreadPoolExecutor, lazy imports, and try/except fallback on all errors. Returns None when enable_graph=False.

tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: pytest tests/unit -v: 84 passed, 2 pre-existing failures (TestDryRunEndToEnd::test_gate_passes_with_no_criticals, TestGitHubPath::test_github_dry_run_produces_valid_output) — both fail on missing 'suggestion' field in test fixtures, unrelated to Phase 1 changes. graph_builder.py exists with defensive coding. enable_graph accessible via get_settings(). Dependency in all three files.

tasks.name: Create src/tools/graph_tools.py
tasks.notes: Created register_graph_tools with 4 tools: get_blast_radius (get_impact_radius + get_transitive_tests), get_callers (get_edges_by_target + search_edges_by_target_name for CALLS), get_dependents (get_edges_by_target + search_edges_by_target_name for IMPORTS_FROM), get_change_analysis (impact radius + risk score + test gaps).

tasks.name: Wire graph tools into OpenAIAgentRunner
tasks.notes: Added graph_store/changed_files optional params to __init__. Conditional register_graph_tools call after register_workspace_tools. SYSTEM_PROMPT updated with graph tool mapping and fallback note.

tasks.name: Wire graph build into ReviewJob.create_findings()
tasks.notes: Inserted Phase 0 graph build block between _build_prompt() and OpenAIAgentRunner construction. Passes graph_store and changed_files=[] to runner.

tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: pytest tests/unit -v: 84 passed, 2 pre-existing failures (same as Phase 1 — missing 'suggestion' field in test fixtures). graph_tools.py exists with 4 tool registrations. Runner accepts graph_store param. ReviewJob wires graph build before runner. SYSTEM_PROMPT updated. Pushed to origin/feat/graph-integration.

tasks.name: Update commands/review-pr-core.md
tasks.notes: Added Step 2b (get_change_analysis with risk_score/review_priorities/test_gaps, skip for T1-T2). Updated Step 5c to prefer get_callers/get_blast_radius over ripgrep with fallback.

tasks.name: Create unit tests
tasks.notes: Created tests/unit/test_graph_builder.py (5 tests: enable_graph=False, ImportError, RuntimeError, success, diagnostic print). Created tests/unit/test_graph_tools.py (11 tests: registration x2, blast_radius x2, callers x3, dependents x2, change_analysis x2). All 16 pass.
